name: Horseradish & Cream Cheese Dip
recipeIngredient: pepper to taste (I sometimes like hot pepper in my dip)
6 slices crisp cooked bacon, chopped or crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cream cheese, horseradish, mayonnaise, salt, and pepper.
2. Add the bacon (drain it on paper towels after frying).
3. Mix well.
4. Refrigerate about 1 hour before serving.
5. Serve with crackers or vegetables.
